test_cases.test_case: Verify user can log in with a registered mobile number and valid OTP.
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application/home screen.

test_cases.test_case: Verify user receives OTP after entering a valid registered mobile number.
test_cases.expected_result: OTP is generated and sent to the entered mobile number.

test_cases.test_case: Verify user can log in by entering a valid OTP within the valid time window.
test_cases.expected_result: Login is successful before OTP expiry.

test_cases.test_case: Verify login fails when an unregistered mobile number is entered.
test_cases.automation_reson: Stable negative validation of a core flow.
test_cases.expected_result: System shows an error or does not proceed with OTP login for unregistered mobile number.

test_cases.test_case: Verify login fails when an invalid OTP is entered.
test_cases.expected_result: System rejects the OTP and displays an invalid OTP message.

test_cases.test_case: Verify login fails when OTP is entered after expiration.
test_cases.expected_result: System rejects the expired OTP and prompts user to request a new OTP.

test_cases.test_case: Verify OTP request is accepted when mobile number is entered with minimum valid digits as per country standard.
test_cases.automation_reson: Stable and repeatable input boundary check.
test_cases.expected_result: OTP request is accepted if the number meets the minimum valid length requirement.

test_cases.test_case: Verify OTP request is accepted when mobile number is entered with maximum valid digits as per country standard.
test_cases.automation_reson: Stable and repeatable input boundary check.
test_cases.expected_result: OTP request is accepted if the number meets the maximum valid length requirement.

test_cases.test_case: Verify system rejects mobile number shorter than the minimum allowed length.
test_cases.expected_result: System shows validation error and does not send OTP.

test_cases.test_case: Verify system rejects mobile number longer than the maximum allowed length.
test_cases.expected_result: System shows validation error and does not send OTP.

test_cases.test_case: Verify mobile number field accepts only numeric digits.
test_cases.expected_result: Non-numeric characters are rejected or prevented from being entered.

test_cases.test_case: Verify mobile number field does not accept special characters.
test_cases.expected_result: Special characters are not accepted and validation message is shown if submitted.

test_cases.test_case: Verify OTP field accepts only numeric digits.
test_cases.expected_result: Non-numeric OTP input is rejected or blocked.

test_cases.test_case: Verify OTP field does not accept more digits than the configured OTP length.
test_cases.expected_result: Extra digits are rejected and user cannot enter more than the OTP length.

test_cases.test_case: Verify OTP field rejects blank submission.
test_cases.expected_result: System displays required field validation message and does not proceed with login.
